basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 04 Project Nurse, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Project Nurse-II / Project Technical Support I Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Project Nurse-II / Project Technical Support I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Project Nurse-II, Max: 30 years for Project Technical Support - I
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Nurse-II is 35 years. Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support - I is 30 years.

qualification.education_qualification: General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course., 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent). Or Three years Graduate degree
qualification.details: Project Nurse-II: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course. Project Technical Support - I: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent) + two Years experience in relevant subject / field. Or Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + one year experience in relevant subject.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse-II: Rs 20,000 + 2,000 (10% HRA) = 22,000/- pm Project Technical Support - I: Rs 18,000 + 1,800 (10% HRA) = 19,800/- pm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
